title: WitherUtils
description: Utilities like a Wither Boss! a Mix in Old and New Age Minecraft Blocks Technical and Useful Evolution!
body:

When working at Technical Ideas
Browse the Wiki ?

Curseforge Modrinth

## WitherUtils
Table of Contents
  1. About The Project

ScreenShots

click here



## About The Project This Blocks will be your best friend when working with Technical Ideas!!! Some of them scanning and Pushing, others are good for placing and breaking! and + some Items and Tools for working on the Fancy Stuff, for example your Base Buildings... with a Chisel like Tool to cut down new Blocks with fancy grayish Look. Some Solar Panels, Mob Spawner, a Collector and many more... ## Changelog
click here
    Version 1.0.41
    added Config Support for SoulOrbs

    Version 1.0.40
    onSpawnForCursed Error Fix

    Version 1.0.39
    SoulOrbs drops as Entity after Short Time,
    and can now be farmed with Vac Blocks etc.

    Version 1.0.38
    ManyMany more Cutter Blocks

    Version 1.0.37
    Added new Cutter Recipes

    Version 1.0.36
    Added new 3D BlockModels
    Fixed all Recipes

    Version 1.0.35
    Added Experience Plate Blocks
    Added Experience Wireless Blocks
    Added Soul Processor
    Added Adapter Items

    Version 1.0.34
    Added Light Block
    Added 4 Dirt Blocks for the Cutter
    Added Farmer Behaviors
    Cactus Farmer
    Berry Farmer

    Version 1.0.33
    Added PlayerSoulPower System
    Sword and Wand can handle SoulOrbs
    Added Rotten Trees
    Rack Terminals can handle Interacting
    Rack shows now Fluid Content Preview
    RottenEarth is done!

    Version 1.0.32
    Fixed DamageSource Error

    Version 1.0.31
    Over 30 Hours of Testing, with
    bunch of Modpacks. Hundreds of smaller
    Bugs now fixed.
    Status: Not a Girl, not yet a WitherUtils!

    Version 1.0.30
    checking for release

    Version 1.0.29
    fixed/todo Miner Blocks. Crashed
    added Rack MultiBlock

    Version 1.0.28
    added Totem Block
    added Totem Items
    added Floodgate Block

    Version 1.0.27
    changed Fisher to MultiBlock
    added SteelArmor
    added SteelArmor Upgrades

    Version 1.0.26
    Forge Version 47.1.0
    added LavaBricks Block
    added GreenHouse Block
    added MetalDoor Block
    added SlabSlices Blocks
    added SteelPole Block
    added SteelRailing Block
    fixed Anvil
    added Farmer Block
    added Spawner Block
    added Activator Block
    added Clicker Block
    added Scanner Block
    added Fisher Block

    Version 1.0.25
    added WallSensor
    added Doors
    added XpWireless
    added XpPlate
    fixed SoulOrb

    Version 1.0.24
    fixed the Solar Panels
    added Miner Blocks
    added SmartTV
    added FloorSensor
    added Connected Texture Blocks for the Cutter Tool
    added Alpha FloodGate

    Version 1.0.23
    added Online Signal Block
    fixed Anvil Recipes
    fixed Anvil Jei

    Version 1.0.22
    fixed LootTable

    Version 1.0.21
    many fixes for the Battery

    Version 1.0.20
    Config for Solar Panels
    fixed the Screen for Battery

    Version 1.0.19
    added Solar Panels
    added Battery
    fixing Rendering Stuff.

    Version 1.0.18
    Power Generator will now charging with the correct Output RF/t.
    The Wand Item is now AOE Weapon. Crouching will attack Mobs in front.
    Tank Reservoir Block added.

## Content
Logic Blocks
  • Forge Energy Battery
  • ItemCollector with Filter
  • Crop Planter Harvester
  • WaterMill Generator
  • Block/Entity/State Scanner
  • Block Placer
  • Block Miner/Breaker
  • Player/Mouse Auto Click Activator
  • Floodgate (Still Fluid)
  • Electric Lights
    • and many more...

    Decorative Blocks
  • Stone
  • Wood
  • Metal
  • Concrete
  • Glass

    • Items/Tools
  • AnvilHammer
  • SoulBank for Stage Leveling
  • Enchantment Items
  • Nether Soul Drops
  • CursedEarth Spawner

    • WitherSteelArmor
  • ForgeEnergy driven
  • Upgrades
  • Fancy Wings

    • WitherSteelSword
  • Dash Function
